title: Countdown Timer
description: Countdown to multiple events in real time. Save up to 10 events in your browser. Free online countdown timer tool.
noEvents: No events yet. Add one using the form above.

howToUse.label: Add an event
howToUse.description: Enter an event name and target date/time, then click Add. Up to 10 events can be saved.

howToUse.label: Watch the real-time countdown
howToUse.description: Days, hours, minutes, and seconds update every second. Events within 7 days are highlighted in accent color.

howToUse.label: Delete completed events
howToUse.description: Click the ✕ button on any card to remove it. Events are saved in your browser's localStorage and persist across page refreshes.

faq.question: Are my events saved when I close the page?
faq.answer: Yes. Events are saved to your browser's localStorage. They persist across page refreshes, but will be lost if you clear your browser data.

faq.question: How many events can I save?
faq.answer: Up to 10 events. Once the limit is reached, the Add button is disabled. Delete an existing event to make room for a new one.

faq.question: What happens when the deadline passes?
faq.answer: After the target time, the countdown switches to an elapsed time display (e.g. '3 days elapsed'). Events are not automatically removed.

faq.question: Why do events within 7 days change color?
faq.answer: Events within 7 days are highlighted with an accent color on the card border and countdown numbers, giving a visual urgency indicator.

faq.question: Can I sync events across devices?
faq.answer: No. Events are stored in your browser's localStorage, so they're only available on the same browser and device. Cross-device sync is not supported.
